creator: mwhite@oakwood.k12.oh.us
text:
I cvsupped my system last night after reading the latest CERT warning on
FreeBSD. Now, when I run "make depend" inside of /usr/src it dies with the
following error:

ncal.c:32: calendar.h: No such file or directory

when it's in the dir usr.bin/ncal

This afternoon I cvsupped again and still get the same error. I'm running
FreeBSD 2.2.6-STABLE.  I can no longer bulid my system. I've already
attempted to remove /usr/obj and try again, but it still dies in the same
place.

Fix: 

No known fix.
How-To-Repeat: 
Run "make depend" in /usr/src. =)
